task_completion.description: Verify that the author field for 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is set to two-field (Person) mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane for the paper 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', the Author field should display two separate text boxes side-by-side (for Last Name and First Name) rather than a single wide text box.

task_completion.description: Verify the author name is correctly entered for 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The two text boxes for the Author field contain 'Shannon' in the Last Name box and 'Claude E.' in the First Name box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the author field for 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' is set to two-field (Person) mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane for the paper 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence', the Author field should display two separate text boxes side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Verify the author name is correctly entered for 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The two text boxes for the Author field contain 'Turing' in the Last Name box and 'Alan' in the First Name box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the author field for 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes' is set to two-field (Person) mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane for the paper 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes', the Author field should display two separate text boxes side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Verify the author name is correctly entered for 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The two text boxes for the Author field contain 'Huffman' in the Last Name box and 'David A.' in the First Name box.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window being interacted with, specifically the right-hand metadata pane.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the Zotero SQLite database directly via terminal or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or scripts modifying the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: The agent actually clicked the toggle buttons to change the field modes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the agent selecting each paper one by one and interacting with the author field toggle button next to the author name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Paper 1 ('A Mathematical Theory of Communication') must have Last Name: 'Shannon', First Name: 'Claude E.'. Paper 2 ('Computing Machinery and Intelligence') must have Last Name: 'Turing', First Name: 'Alan'. Paper 3 ('A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes') must have Last Name: 'Huffman', First Name: 'David A.'. In Zotero, two-field mode (Person) is visually indicated by two separate text boxes for the author's name, whereas single-field mode (Organization) has only one wide text box.
